name: Knowledge Profiles Support Rubric-aligned LLM Response Generation
statement: Ipci et al. propose generating rubric-aligned synthetic student responses with LLMs guided by knowledge profiles and representative examples, including straightforward and error-informed profile-based strategies.
quantitative_note: Repository metadata reports N = 585 authentic open-ended logical-proof responses as the comparator dataset.
caveats: The staged extraction is from the repository metadata page, not a full prompt appendix.
The method is bounded to logical-proof response generation and augmentation.
evaluation_method: Embedding-based diversity and realism analysis plus automated-grading model-training utility.
reported_metrics: N = 585 authentic responses; diversity, realism, and training-utility comparisons are summarized.
limitations: Synthetic-only training reportedly performs worse than real data.
Fine-grained prompt parameters require full-text review.

source_locator.quote_or_paraphrase_note: The staged finding paraphrases the abstract's knowledge-profile and representative-example generation strategy.
